content: i hate this you have to pay
You have to pay almost $14 CAD a week to chat with a small amount of pretty poorly made bots, which is already bad, but for an app called SPICY chat, you're not allowed to be spicy with the bots.
a big no it's so annoying
worst app I've ever used. nothing specific, nothing interesting, literally worst!
it's really irritating me cause I logged in my account on Google I thought it was free but no you need to pay uhh so irritating 🙄
forcing ppl to pay for ur subscriptions BEFORE even getting to experience the app is ridiculous, i wish i could give this app 0 star
can't do anything without paying. don't waste your time
Can't even chat, after choosing it directly exit and goes home screen
I couldn't really try it because they always asked me to subscribe... since I didn't, I couldn't chat with any bot 😭
